summary: Iteration 137 - Frontend testing of DineSoulPage v2 and CelebratePageNew regression. All 6 specified features verified via browser automation. Dine page no-pet state renders full-bleed amber/terracotta hero correctly. Celebrate page shows purple gradient with 'Celebrations for your pet' heading. No console errors on either page.
critical_code_review_comments: DineSoulPage.jsx line 625: NoPetState wraps in PillarPageLayout with hideNavigation=true BUT the top navigation bar still shows correctly (hideNavigation only hides the internal pillar nav, not the global header nav) - working as intended

DineSoulPage.jsx: TabBar with 'Eat & Nourish' and 'Dine Out' tabs is defined in code (data-testid='dine-tab-bar', 'dine-tab-eat', 'dine-tab-out') but only visible when a pet is loaded - cannot be tested without login
CelebratePageNew.jsx line 347-360: 'Celebrate, Personally' heading above CelebrateServiceGrid is correctly implemented and only renders when selectedPet is present - cannot be tested without login
MOCK: MOCK_SPOTS (restaurant locations) and DINE_DIMS products (hardcoded catalog) are mocked inline in DineSoulPage.jsx - no real API calls for these
context_for_next_testing_agent: DineSoulPage v2 is fully working. No-pet state: full-bleed amber/terracotta gradient (border-radius:0px confirmed), plate icon, 'Food & Nourishment for your pet' h1, 'Add your dog to begin' button. Nav bar visible at top. Zero console errors. Celebrate page: purple gradient, 'Celebrations for your pet' h1, 'Add your pet to begin' button - no regression. Tab bar ('Eat & Nourish', 'Dine Out') and 'Celebrate, Personally' heading require logged-in user with pet to test - verify against code structure which is correct.

dine_no_pet_hero_gradient.evidence: NoPetState background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(61, 18, 0) 0%, rgb(122, 40, 0) 50%, rgb(196, 68, 0) 100%) - full-bleed, border-radius=0px

dine_plate_icon.evidence: Plate icon 🍽️ found x2 on page (once in hero, once in loading state DOM)

dine_food_nourishment_title.evidence: 'Food & Nourishment for your pet' h1 visible on no-pet state

dine_add_pet_button.evidence: Button data-testid='dine-add-pet-btn' visible with text '✦ Add your dog to begin'

dine_nav_bar_visible.evidence: nav element visible=True at top of page; PillarPageLayout renders global nav correctly

dine_no_console_errors.evidence: 0 console errors, 0 page errors on /dine route

celebrate_regression_title.evidence: H1 'Celebrations for your pet' present on /celebrate-soul

celebrate_regression_gradient.evidence: Background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(26, 10, 46) 0%, rgb(22, 8, 42) 50%, rgb(45, 27, 78) 100%) - purple gradient intact

dine_tab_bar_code.evidence: TabBar renders 'Eat & Nourish' and 'Dine Out' tabs with data-testid='dine-tab-eat' and 'dine-tab-out' - only shown when pet present (requires login to test live)

celebrate_personally_heading_code.evidence: CelebratePageNew.jsx line 351-353: 'Celebrate, Personally' div above CelebrateServiceGrid - only rendered when selectedPet present (requires login to test live)
